contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Activated Telegram attention watchdog + coordinated sophia upgrade with parallel agent session
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/327
  
  Details:
  Operator completed the one-time MTProto activation of the Telegram attention watchdog: diagnosed the my.telegram.org code-delivery stall (codes arrive only in the in-app Telegram service chat and repeated requests silently rate-limit), obtained api_id/api_hash on a clean retry, performed the interactive Telethon login on the sophia EC2 box, and brought the truesight-autopilot-watchdog unit live (verified in journal: watchdog up as garyjob). Unanswered question-shaped Telegram DMs and mentions now nudge his Saved Messages on a 4h/2h SLA with a daily digest — closing the coordination failure mode that cancelled the June 12 cacao serving. Also coordinated the concurrent sophia hardware upgrade with the parallel agent session handling it: conveyed the AMI blue/green strategy decision (periodic AMI backups, spin replacement instance, repoint Elastic IP, retire old box) and the session-safety constraints documented in CONTEXT_UPDATES. Backlog entry closed in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS. Build-phase PRs were logged in earlier contribution entries; this entry covers the activation and coordination work only.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
